public_reputation: Senior dye master preserving elite cloth quality, color consistency, and costly fabric secrecy in Shelk's fashion economy.
appearance: Master Dyer Olven Rist carries the marks of master dyer in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a master dyer whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Crystal Loom Emporium.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of master dyer in and around Crystal Loom Emporium, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Crystal Loom Emporium while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Master Dyer Olven Rist can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Crystal Loom Emporium.
Master Dyer Olven Rist becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a master dyer.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Master Dyer Olven Rist is readable as a master dyer tied to Crystal Loom Emporium.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Crystal Loom Emporium: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Master Dyer Olven Rist presents as someone shaped by the duties of a master dyer and the daily pressures of Crystal Loom Emporium.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a master dyer, and proof that strangers will not make Crystal Loom Emporium harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Master Dyer Olven Rist refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a master dyer too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Master Dyer Olven Rist can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Master Dyer Olven Rist adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Master Dyer Olven Rist always knows more about Crystal Loom Emporium than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to master dyer duties in Crystal Loom Emporium.
social_texture: Master Dyer Olven Rist speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Crystal Loom Emporium, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Master touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Master Dyer Olven Rist when the party needs a socially grounded face for Crystal Loom Emporium: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
